# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This is a fragrance quiz application for the Michael Malul brand built with React and Vite.

## Project Overview
- **Type**: React + Vite web application
- **Purpose**: Interactive quiz to match users with their perfect fragrance
- **Key Features**: Question-based recommendation system, elegant UI, responsive design

## Architecture
- Quiz component handles question display and answer selection
- Results component displays top 2 fragrance recommendations
- Quiz data system manages questions and fragrance associations
- Algorithm calculates recommendations based on answer frequency

## Styling Guidelines
- Uses elegant serif typography (Georgia/Garamond)
- Gold accent color (#d4af37) for premium feel
- Dark primary color (#1a1a1a) for text
- Light backgrounds with subtle gradients
- Smooth animations and hover effects

## Future Enhancements
- Replace placeholder images with actual fragrance product images
- Update fragrance descriptions with real product details
- Link "View on Michael Malul" button to actual product pages
- Add sharing functionality for results
- Consider adding fragrance note descriptions
